name: Farmer's Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the pork chops with flour.
2. Brown the coated chops with garlic in 2 tablespoons of oil.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Place the potatoes at the bottom of a large baking dish, ensuring there is enough space for the chops without crowding them.
5. Position the chops on top of the potatoes.
6. Arrange the onion slices into rings over the chops.
7. Combine the sour cream and dry mustard in a separate bowl.
8. Pour the mixture evenly over all the ingredients.
9. Cover the baking dish with foil and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
10. Remove the foil and continue to bake until the top is nicely browned.
